justification: Gradient Boosting achieves the highest weighted F1 score (0.9901) among classifiers, indicating the best balance between precision and recall across all classes.
Its macro AUC of 0.9986 demonstrates excellent discrimination ability between Low, Medium, and High potential classes.
For regression, Gradient Boosting achieves R²=0.9924 with RMSE=1.0108 GTPI points, meaning predictions deviate by only ~1.0108 points on a 0-100 scale.
Cross-validation confirms generalization — the model performs consistently across different data splits, not just on one lucky test set.
